# HyprFlux Documentation

> A complete Arch Linux distribution featuring a beautiful, productive Hyprland desktop environment.

## What is HyprFlux?

HyprFlux is a complete operating system built on Arch Linux, featuring the Hyprland Wayland compositor. It provides a minimal, productive, and elegant desktop experience with pre-configured dotfiles.

## Available in Two Forms

1. **ISO (Complete Operating System)** - A full Arch Linux distribution with HyprFlux pre-configured, install via bootable USB
2. **Dotfiles Distribution** - Configuration files for existing Arch Linux installations

## Installation Options

- **Download ISO**: https://hyprflux.org/general/download
- **Install Dotfiles**: https://hyprflux.org/complete/hyprflux

## Key Components

- Hyprland (Wayland compositor)
- Waybar (status bar)
- Rofi (launcher)
- SwayNC (notifications)
- Hyprlock (lock screen)
- Kitty (terminal)
- Neovim (editor)
- Yazi (file manager)

## Documentation Structure

- `/general/quickstart` - Getting started guide
- `/general/iso-installation` - ISO installation steps
- `/general/download` - Download links
- `/general/showcase` - Screenshots and demos
- `/keybindings/hyprland` - Keyboard shortcuts
- `/features/` - Component documentation
- `/hyprland/` - Configuration reference

## Search Tips

When searching this documentation, use keywords like:
- "install", "download", "setup"
- "keybindings", "shortcuts", "keyboard"
- "config", "configuration", "hyprland"
- "hyprlock", "waybar", "rofi"
- Component names (e.g., "rofi", "waybar", "hyprlock")

## Sitemap

- https://hyprflux.org/sitemap.xml
